feat(state): add POSIX flock-based file locking for concurrent access Implement file locking to prevent corruption when multiple Neovim instances access state.json simultaneously: - Add acquire_lock() helper using vim.uv.fs_flock() with retry logic - Add release_lock() helper for proper cleanup - Modify save() to use exclusive lock before writing - Modify load() to use shared lock for reading - Platform detection for Windows (skip locking) and feature detection for vim.uv.fs_flock() availability (Neovim 0.10+) - Locks properly released even on error via pcall + finally pattern - Add 4 comprehensive tests for concurrent access scenarios Task: task-3
